BomItem.description: Multilayer Ceramic Capacitors MLCC - SMD/SMT RECOMMENDED ALT 810-C3216X8R1E105K

Black:The 66.9040-22 is an 4mm Angled Socket for mounting on PCBs, gold-plated brass contact terminal.
Red: The 66.9040-22 is an 4mm Angled Socket for mounting on PCBs, gold-plated brass contact terminal.
Micro-Fit 3.0 Vertical Header, 3.00mm Pitch, Single Row, 4 Circuits, with PCB Press-fit Metal Retention Clip, Glow-Wire Capable, Black
Power to the Board TEN60 RA RECPT ASSY 2-CKT PRESS-FIT
Test Plugs & Test Jacks TEST POINT (BLUE) - COMPACT
Test Plugs & Test Jacks TEST POINT BLACK MULTIPURPOSE
